75558.subject: 🔷 The Daily: Strategy sells $216 million of bitcoin
75558.body:
Vitalik Buterin proposes 'Extremely Lean' Ethereum | Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization for crypto services across 30 EEA countries | Bernstein holds 'ambitious' $150K year-end bitcoin target despite 54% drawdown | Nigel Farage failed to declare funding from crypto gambling figure convicted of fraud |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

BitGo ( https://www.bitgo.com/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Monday! With a light macro calendar this week, *21Shares* Head of Macro *Stephen Coltman* told The Block that markets will look to earnings season and next week's U.S. inflation report to determine whether *bitcoin* can build on its rebound above $60,000.

In today's newsletter, *Strategy* sells $216 million worth of *bitcoin* , *Vitalik Buterin* says *Ethereum's* next rebuild will rival *The Merge* , *Ripple* secures full *MiCA CASP* authorization, and more.

Meanwhile, *President Trump* says he's a " big crypto guy ( https://www.theblock.co/post/407312/president-trump-big-crypto-guy-distancing-familys-crypto-ventures?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) ," while distancing himself from his family's crypto ventures.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read — and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*💸 Strategy sells 3,588 BTC for $216 million, with total bitcoin holdings still underwater*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/407217/strategy-bitcoin-digital-energy?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

*Bitcoin* treasury firm *Strategy* sold 3,588 BTC for roughly $216 million last week, cutting its total holdings to 843,775 BTC, according to an *SEC* filing.

* The firm used the proceeds to fund preferred stock distributions and replenish its USD reserve to $2.55 billion as of July 5.
* Strategy's total holdings still sit underwater, carrying around $11.4 billion in paper losses on bitcoin bought at an average price of $74,476.
* The company also reported an $8.32 billion loss on digital assets for Q2 in the filing, driven almost entirely by an $8.31 billion unrealized loss.
* *JPMorgan* analysts recently warned the new sale policy introduces "avoidable two-way risk" by making Strategy both a buyer and seller, though *Bernstein* analysts argued its balance sheet makes forced selling unlikely.
* *MSTR* gained 21.1% last week to close Thursday at $100.77 followi

75556.subject: 🔴 Inside Geopolitics: Is Israel on its own?
75556.body:
The Economist
 

 
 


 
  
  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌   ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌

 July 6th 2026

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6cvhcjugQaWoO4C8fAY8bCfJFJErPQm1ZqreDSjFyDyJXjgcAT2cdfRiYJNOrjY6TdEnK2594LAUgVq8Wl1OzjdH10LI9BFSPCU_jgqKE3M8Q 



 












https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6cvhcjvM3GSUgtaXzyyBGtvgrSYPf7z6ob0Z3OgDbS8hOyqZ5llMKk1udrRh7o5FGJbIDJYqDN1L_05D63h1RLkD4ukGFOXszeyVBwJ 

PHOTO: GETTY IMAGES


 Is Israel on its own?


 David Rennie

Geopolitics editor 


 Back in the 1980s, an Israeli diplomat began to earn fame at home for his swaggering performances on American television. When Israel was criticised, Binyamin Netanyahu was there, fighting his country’s corner in flawless, American-accented English. In the Trump era, that talent for convincing Americans helped Mr Netanyahu,

 Investor Call)
75555.body:
View in browser (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VVPF8v4wfHTwN2L6z_lL8NFvVGwS3m5R8n6NN26s6065jMY8W6N1X8z6lZ3lkW3Y6dhQ85hBqMVVNTlP8CrDWXW1kXVPF4gyhZWW5bNj0c4g9hf6N367SQ4VTtKVW6Z_bxx6ctjCjW99JVmn2Z6w9cW5KSLDK6mNbzwW5CmDfq3PYvPfW53knNV3lc7nWW2RYStd8Nq_PZW8zvPGm96Jgg_N7hR8_bjPdlLN6BZPLm6bDz-W6c5X_d2wT7YsW3zcVbF7JrWc5W75X7gS6RLWqPW4LdTRd4lWP0vN58JYMPX5K-RW4Gsch57mmhkyW93CZJb53HblLN5Q-34Kgj84lN4QYlBjl1swgW17lFnW7CZSLlN1Mwx6L1YQwfW4w9RV04vrdk2W4n15Wm2mb-KtW3tfv9V2phfztW6yPjJt50z_71W4D0t9t4bkWfMN25gVMx56QMtMJdmsyL10hqW1jzStz3hb9NfW4_zSyX1P6zLxW77d7xl7tsTK8W8BDxd_1hQRstW1htPzV6063kqW45GBdj4JHjqMf2RPbkl04 )

Ecosystem Update Reminder (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VVPF8v4wfHTwN2L6z_lL8NFvVGwS3m5R8n6NN26s5_R3lcq-W69sMD-6lZ3n3W2ZBBvs1-cWkJW5rCXVq1_TrnXVVWTbr8z55cWW6tS6rc36r728W8GXgJC29hKfJW38xK4w2BljtmVmyK3T2-NQdvW91hCfY3DR7cXW844fpz8R5JM8W6bS2ct5YmQpfW77X8qX4rtv8gW7-lH9j3LDVSCMPClQ2XnzYlMqCMQsF06frMSn0jGkdTyrW6-DMCy1M-0kvW7YVCdh3Y_dSfN48dT6FmMr55W4PpjJ64WfDYtW7NyQZf8T473Ff77KnY404 )

Hi Oleh,

A reminder that our Q2 Maple Ecosystem Update (formerly the Investor Call and Token Holder Call) is this week - Wednesday July 8, 2026 at 11:00 AM ET.

Maple Co-Founders Sidney Powell (CEO) and Joe Flanagan (Chairman) will walk through the quarter, share more about what's coming next, and answer your questions. If you hold SYRUP, partner with Maple, earn via syrupUSD, borrow from Maple, or don't yet work with us but are following Maple's growth, this call is for you.

What we'll cover:

-

H1 2026 in review - revenue, ARR, and an all-time-high loan book

-

Financials & token utility - balance sheet, buybacks, and value accrual to SYRUP

-

Looking ahead to H2 and beyond - market direction, positioning, and guidance

-

Q&A

How to join: We'll be live on X.

Can't make it live? The recording will be available to watch back.

Have a question you'd like answered? Submit it here (https://d31hK604.eu1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/GG+113/d31hK604/VVPF8v4wfHTwN2L6z_lL8NFvVGwS3m5R8n6NN26s6063lcq-W6N1vHY6lZ3nVW7xkQxf3qvWNwW2wR41783WGqWW22vTYw3dGRkYW2bn1fs1yf1MMV2qMks4XBZlVW8dZLYM3dQlhVW5Gm5vs7dwClSW6hyTKY3bRQxvN3TNyHn3vZ4_W7jxz842R8_3_W7CWjBx8_m8jvN6PDb46JnBwvW6z9jXR9608zbTbdTG7dfynLW175qqf6VgN7-W32KtfQ1S7b9xW7gtns74qQgL3W5Rlz_72wBQjHW5phkgc5pFm8qN6CyJ6K_0y-0W4wjJrd8X9NtWW6l13DL5KShFLf7Rzw6004 ) in advance.

See you Wednesday

Team Maple

Maple Labs Pty., 452 FLINDERS STREET, Level 1, MELBOURNE, Victoria 3000, Australia

Unsubscribe (https://hs-25712430.s.hubspotemail-eu1.net/hs/preferences-center/en/direct?data=W2nVjwf3Y2wWmW3QRHnP1Q6b3TW2PhwfD2MSMLjW3bkWK-3jmlMdW3jpW2V1VzKLzW3R4Q0Q4pqf17W3GJ7Ph3HbHPLW3LNK--4tGCSgW3_MPBh4cQhQyW4fj1L93SQJ4QW4rC4983SLXSBW3C8_lg30G6zVW1S8WSC1NBQjSW2vS3G-3J-lfRW2KFMRF41sgrXW43rjDJ3BZJDPW4cLXnY2zKVwmW2-g6vB38v0QKW4plWmV3_R6pjW41ZQgy2HCTGyW3yQ9lW1_n960W4rhqFr2-w16xW2PThC93ZwdJjW47y3S02-FzyNW2zwbDY3ZVDqNW2vQl-32FB075W45C9-21_rxj3W4fFmzD2CKd6RW1_6W6d3_rGrRW2t3m1n3X

75554.subject: The world’s most liveable cities in 2026
75554.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ6ro7Eyx1vtyRVAYk9LgmQQCi2zjDHiEJiTf8hH-_WEgtlkthkysOk3XCh1IYFFhcL7l4myA2oqEEPmQkcPvMlIj_FS1HndSUgDBjM 

July 6th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ7WuHdCYKIicSB9uKeY2QEJfbZc35ZnS3RKwax9sBxWz5CU8q5HKu8kypddqBPCF7iz7k5fDSsf-dm1KFt7oHLh9egZLagNFt4_5mh 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ8bn8T5GR6hla55fiVQA8vfovhwwyPrZjaYENT7NJfmFUSd3wTKhpBQQHrK72SmElklrPxieiFiU1cPZ0kOva47oov5LufdbsqoPGH 


 


 
 

Stephanie Studer

Senior digital editor



 For some people, this city had it all: good schools, little rain, low or no taxes—and safety. Then came the Iran war. In the latest liveable-cities ranking by EIU, our sister organisation, the city has fallen four places (any guesses?). The index ranks 173 cities from most to least liveable. 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ9AY_b6bdAJyhe504PtgSIfsz7ZGJPGVRSzeF4DUx_ughi3am6B9ybzukTCQD7bNPRJbuO7F7Pp8Ymr_M80KiMMdrPvxmJE7U 
This year’s winner 
 has a lot more wet weather, but everything else going for it.


 Elsewhere: 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjl9AAcAAAAAA6arleQ-_O7dJIKtSR5Q94DkLw1tUlZebSefX72-GMaTqcZBcRlIwSirAQLg_XUNtnH3rmmEk67h05_vZpFZ7AZjjQCH6E

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Strategy's first-ever Bitcoin sale to fund dividends rattled an already-jittery market, dragging BTC below $62K — yet fresh MiCA licenses, a Solana ETF filing and a $19B miner-to-AI pivot kept institutional momentum firmly alive. 🔴 Strategy Sells 3,588 BTC for $216M — Its Largest Sale Ever Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically accelerated its Bitcoin disposals, offloading 3,588 BTC (~$216M) last week to replenish dollar reserves for preferred-stock dividends. It was the firm's first meaningful sale since building its never-sell identity, and it landed alongside a reported $8.3B Q2 unrealized loss, pushing BTC below $62,000. Read full story 🇪🇺 Ripple Wins Full MiCA Authorization Across Europe Luxembourg's CSSF upgraded Ripple's preliminary crypto-asset provider license to fully compliant, making it one of the few firms fully MiCA-authorized for payments and institutional services across all 30 European Economic Area countries. More details 🏛️ SEC Closes Consensys Ethereum 2.0 Probe Consensys said the SEC has closed its investigation into Ethereum 2.0 without recommending enforcement action, lifting a long-standing regulatory cloud over ETH staking and removing a major overhang for the network. Read more 🚨 Summer.fi Halts Lazy Summer Vaults After $6M Exploit DeFi protocol Summer.fi paused its Lazy Summer vaults following a roughly $6 million exploit, with its SUMR token falling more than 18% in the aftermath as the team assessed the damage. See details 📈 VanEck Files for Spot Solana ETF A VanEck-linked proposal reached the SEC via a Cboe BZX rule filing, formally putting Solana into the U.S. spot ETF conversation and pushing the altcoin fund race beyond Bitcoin and Ethereum. Read full story 🏢 TeraWulf Signs $19B Anthropic Data Center Lease Bitcoin miner TeraWulf's stock surged double digits after signing a 20-year lease with AI firm Anthropic at its Kentucky site — expected to deliver 401 MW of IT load and generate roughly $19 billion in revenue, underscoring the miner-to-AI infrastructure pivot. More details ⚙️ Vitalik Reveals Ethereum's Biggest Rebuild Since The Merge Vitalik Buterin detailed a revised "Lean Ethereum" roadmap that would replace nearly every major part of the protocol, moving quantum resistance and privacy up the priority list. It lands as ether rallies more than 12% over the past wee
